title: Australian Roasted Panini
description: A delicious panini sandwich filled with roasted Australian meats and served on crispy flatbread.
instructions: 1. Preheat a panini press or grill to medium-high heat.
2. Slice the roasted Australian steak into thin strips.
3. Assemble the panini by layering the steak, roasted red onions, roasted bell peppers, and resilient rosemary on one slice of flatbread.
4. Top with Australian cheddar cheese and another slice of flatbread.
5. Place the panini in the press or grill and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the flatbread is crispy.
6. Remove from heat and let cool for a minute before serving.
